narrative:
Lyme Township has 615 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
